name: Bitbucket
description: Bitbucket is a Git-based source code hosting and collaboration platform from Atlassian, integrated with Jira and the Atlassian developer suite.

years.notes: Original stylized bucket mark (top oval + body + center dot) used from launch in 2008 through the 2017 Atlassian rebrand. Sourced from simple-icons commit bc9f1c0 (last pre-redesign revision); the historical Bitbucket dark blue #205081 is applied since simple-icons strips fills to monochrome.
2017 Atlassian rebrand — three-bucket negative-space mark with the official #0052CC → #2684FF blue gradient from atlassian.design. Gradient layer reconstructed over the simple-icons 24x24 path.
